children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: In making a grant under this subchapter, the Secretary of Transportation may give priority to a project that is consistent with an integrated airport system plan.

children.heading: .—Discretionary Funding To Be Used for Higher Priority Projects
children.label: b .—Discretionary Funding To Be Used for Higher Priority Projects
children.text: The Administrator of the Federal Aviation Administration shall discourage airport sponsors and airports from using entitlement funds for lower priority projects by giving lower priority to discretionary projects submitted by airport sponsors and airports that have used entitlement funds for projects that have a lower priority than the projects for which discretionary funds are being requested.
